source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication. No renewal in Copyright office.
title: Sunset of Muir Inlet, Glacier Bay, Alaska
description: 1899 Curtis photograph from the Harriman Alaska Expedition showing icebergs silhouetted against a sunset sky at Muir Inlet, Glacier Bay — the same Southeast Alaska landscape that passengers sailing College Fjord experience at the day's end.
alt: Historical 1899 photograph of icebergs on calm water at sunset with silhouetted mountain peaks, Muir Inlet, Glacier Bay, Alaska
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-10/11 image sourcing workflow; downloaded from tile.loc.gov, visually confirmed
